entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum L. studied for root system variation across environments.

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM
entities.description: The network of roots in chickpea genotypes analyzed for genotypic variation.

entities.name: SOIL BULK DENSITY
entities.description: A soil physical property that varies across environments and affects root growth.

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS LEVELS
entities.description: The concentration of phosphorus in the soil affecting root development.

entities.name: MOISTURE REGIMES
entities.description: The varying levels of water availability in the soil environments.

entities.name: POT STUDY
entities.description: A controlled experimental method used to compare chickpea genotypes.

entities.name: ICC 4958
entities.description: A specific chickpea genotype showing superior rooting ability and stress tolerance.

entities.name: ICCV 94916-4
entities.description: A specific chickpea genotype showing high root length density and root dry weight.

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH DENSITY
entities.description: A root trait (RLD) used to measure root proliferation and acquisition potential.

entities.name: ROOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: A root trait (RDW) measuring the total biomass of the root system.

entities.name: P STRESS
entities.description: Conditions of phosphorus deficiency that influence the expression of root traits.

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Studies conducted in natural soil environments to evaluate genotype performance.

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: Conditions of limited water availability in the soil.

entities.name: ROOTING ABILITY
entities.description: The general capacity of a genotype to develop an effective root system.

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand water-limited conditions.

entities.name: P ACQUISITION ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of the root system to efficiently take up phosphorus from the soil.

entities.name: ROOT PROLIFERATION
entities.description: The growth and spreading of roots, specifically expressed through root length density.
